=================================== FAILURES ===================================
____________________ test_validate_email_invalid ____________________

    def test_validate_email_invalid():
        """Test that invalid emails are rejected."""
        invalid_emails = [
            "notanemail",
            "@nodomain.com",
            "missing@",
            "spaces in@email.com",
        ]
        for email in invalid_emails:
            result = validate_email(email)
>           assert result is False, f"Expected False for '{email}', got {result}"
E           AssertionError: Expected False for 'spaces in@email.com', got True
E           The email validator incorrectly accepted an email with spaces.

tests/test_utils.py:87: AssertionError

_________________________ test_parse_date_invalid _____________________________

    def test_parse_date_invalid():
        """Test that invalid date strings raise ValueError."""
        bad_dates = ["2024-13-01", "2024-00-15", "not-a-date"]
        for d in bad_dates:
>           with pytest.raises(ValueError):
>               parse_date(d)
E           Failed: DID NOT RAISE <class 'ValueError'>
E           parse_date("2024-13-01") returned datetime(2024, 1, 1) instead of raising

tests/test_utils.py:101: Failed
